official_sources.authority_note: Official binary source for the Play clientbound packet table and the commands packet id.
Official binary source for constructing, writing, reading, and observing the commands command-tree body.
Official binary source for writing and dispatch-decoding the full Play clientbound commands frame.

field_notes.fixture: Uses the official ClientboundCommandsPacket(RootCommandNode<S>, NodeInspector<S>) constructor with an empty Brigadier CommandDispatcher root. This is a smallest context-free fixture and does not require argument nodes, an argument registry payload, command context, client Level, or initialized game state.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound commands packet framing and dispatch/decode for one official empty root-only command tree fixture only; do not infer literal/argument node payloads, redirects, custom suggestions, restricted flags, Brigadier command semantics, command context behavior, command UI behavior, runtime Play entry, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
